LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RICHARD LEE, JEAN CHIN AND JOAN ONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED FACTS FAILS TO LIST FACTS FOR ISSUES THREE, FIVE AND SEVEN. FOR ISSUE ONE, THE STATEMENT IS SILENT AS TO ANY FACTS SUPPORTING THE CONTENTION THAT DEFENDANT IS ENGAGED IN A LAWFUL BUSINESS OR IS NOT ENGAGED IN UNFAIR PRACTICES. WITH RESPECT TO ISSUES TWO, FOUR AND SIX, DEFENDANT'S RELIANCE ON THE TESTIMONY OF PLAINTIFF IS INADEQUATE BASED ON THE HOLDING IN WEBER V JOHN CRANE, INC. (2006) 143 CAL. APP. 4TH 1433. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
